message.content:
Based on the screenshot you've shared, I can see the Vercel deployment page for a project called "systeme-funnel-example", but I don't see any specific error message displayed in the visible portion of the interface. The deployment appears to be in a "Ready Latest" status with a duration of 29s.

The screenshot shows:
- A Vercel deployment page for "systeme-funnel-example"
- The deployment status shows "Ready Latest"
- The environment is set to "Production"
- The deployment was created 48s ago
- There are three domains associated with the deployment
- The source is from the "main" branch (commit 423458a)

To see the actual error message, you would need to:
1. Click on the "Logs" tab to view the deployment logs
2. Or click on the "Logs" button in the top right corner of the deployment details

The logs would contain the specific error text, file names, and line numbers that would help diagnose what went wrong during the deployment. Without accessing the logs, I cannot provide the exact error message or details about what failed.
